note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.description: Verify adding a new word in Hidden Word section
testcases.raw: TC_001WordsearchPositiveVerify adding a new word in Hidden Word section 1. Login and navigate to the Word Search page. 2. Enter a word in the Hidden Word field. 3. Click the Add button. The new word appears in the WORDS section and is highlighted with a blue line in the grid.Pending

testcases.description: Verify blue highlight for added word1. Add a word .2. Observe the grid. The added word is highlighted with a blue line in the grid.Pending
testcases.raw: TC_002WordsearchPositiveVerify blue highlight for added word1. Add a word .2. Observe the grid. The added word is highlighted with a blue line in the grid.Pending

testcases.description: Verify Show Words checkbox default state
testcases.raw: TC_003WordsearchPositiveVerify Show Words checkbox default state 1. Login and navigate to the Word Search settings. 2. Observe the Show Words checkbox. Show Words checkbox is checked by default. WORDS section is visible.Pending

testcases.description: Verify removing Show Words hides WORDS section
testcases.raw: TC_004WordsearchNegativeVerify removing Show Words hides WORDS section 1. Uncheck the Show Words checkbox in settings. WORDS section disappears from the Author page.Pending

testcases.description: Verify Add Show Me, Add Header, and Add Instruction Text checkboxes default state
testcases.raw: TC_005WordsearchPositive Verify Add Show Me, Add Header, and Add Instruction Text checkboxes default state 1. Navigate to Settings panel. 2. Observe Add Show Me, Add Header, Add Instruction Text checkboxes. All three checkboxes are checked by default.Pending

testcases.description: Verify correct word selection in preview
testcases.raw: TC_006WordsearchPositiveVerify correct word selection in preview 1. Click Preview. 2. Select the correct word in the grid. The word in the WORDS section is shown with a strikethrough and highlighted in the grid.Pending

testcases.description: Verify incorrect word selection in preview
testcases.raw: TC_007WordsearchNegativeVerify incorrect word selection in preview 1. Click Preview. 2. Select a word in the grid not present in the WORDS section. No strikethrough occurs in the WORDS section. No highlight appears for that word.Pending

testcases.description: Verify shuffle functionality for grid1. Click the Shuffle button in Settings. Grid letters are shuffled. WORDS section and settings remain unchanged.Pending
testcases.raw: TC_008WordsearchPositiveVerify shuffle functionality for grid1. Click the Shuffle button in Settings. Grid letters are shuffled. WORDS section and settings remain unchanged.Pending

testcases.description: Verify persistence of words after saving
testcases.raw: TC_009WordsearchPositiveVerify persistence of words after saving 1. Add a new word in Hidden Word section. 2. Click Save. 3. Refresh or revisit the page. The added word remains in the WORDS section after refresh or revisit.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding duplicate words
testcases.raw: TC_010WordsearchNegativeVerify adding duplicate words 1. Add a word that already exists in the WORDS section. System prevents duplicates or indicates an error. Duplicate is not added.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding a blank word
testcases.raw: TC_011WordsearchNegativeVerify adding a blank word 1. Leave the Hidden Word input blank. 2. Click Add. System should not add a blank word and should show a validation message.Pending

testcases.description: Verify deleting a word from WORDS section
testcases.raw: TC_012WordsearchPositiveVerify deleting a word from WORDS section 1. Add a word to WORDS section. 2. Delete the word using the provided option (if available). The word is removed from the WORDS section and not highlighted in the grid.Pending

testcases.description: Verify correct word remains after grid shuffle
testcases.raw: TC_013WordsearchPositiveVerify correct word remains after grid shuffle 1. Add a word and verify highlight. 2. Click Shuffle. 3. Check highlight for the word. The same word remains highlighted after grid shuffle.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding excessively long word
testcases.raw: TC_014WordsearchNegativeVerify adding excessively long word 1. Enter a word exceeding the allowed length (e.g. 50 characters) in Hidden Word. 2. Click Add. System rejects input and shows validation or error message.Pending

testcases.description: Verify case-insensitive word addition
testcases.raw: TC_015WordsearchPositiveVerify case-insensitive word addition 1. Add a word in lowercase (e.g. "test"). 2. Add same word in uppercase (e.g. "TEST"). System treats both as the same word; no duplicates are created.Pending

testcases.description: Verify word can be found along different directions
testcases.raw: TC_016WordsearchPositiveVerify word can be found along different directions 1. Add a word that can be placed horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. 2. Preview and select the word. The word can be correctly highlighted and strikethrough applied in all directions.Pending

testcases.description: Verify undo action restores previous state
testcases.raw: TC_017WordsearchPositiveVerify undo action restores previous state 1. Make changes (add/remove word). 2. Click Undo (if available). The previous state of words/selection is restored.Pending

testcases.description: Verify input of duplicate word with different spacing
testcases.raw: TC_018WordsearchNegative Verify input of duplicate word with different spacing 1. Add a word with leading/trailing spaces. 2. Add same word without spaces. System trims spaces and prevents duplicate entry.Pending

testcases.description: Verify preview mode disables editing
testcases.raw: TC_019WordsearchPositiveVerify preview mode disables editing 1. Click Preview. 2. Attempt to add or remove words in WORDS section.Editing is disabled in preview mode.Pending

testcases.description: Verify focus moves to input after clicking Add
testcases.raw: TC_020WordsearchPositiveVerify focus moves to input after clicking Add 1. Enter a word. 2. Click Add. 3. Check if the input field is focused for next entry. Input field is focused and ready for the next word.Pending

testcases.description: Verify grid highlight not shown for partial matches
testcases.raw: TC_021WordsearchNegativeVerify grid highlight not shown for partial matches 1. Add a word (e.g. "CAT"). 2. Select only part of the word (e.g. "CA") in the grid during preview. No highlight or strikethrough is shown for partial matches.Pending

testcases.description: Verify multi-word addition (if supported)
testcases.raw: TC_022WordsearchPositiveVerify multi-word addition (if supported) 1. Enter multiple words separated by comma or space (e.g. "DOG, CAT"). 2. Click Add. All unique valid words are added to the WORDS section.Pending

testcases.description: Verify persistence after browser refresh
testcases.raw: TC_023WordsearchPositiveVerify persistence after browser refresh 1. Add a word. 2. Refresh the browser. 3. Verify words in WORDS section.Recently added words persist after refresh.Pending

testcases.description: Verify order of words in WORDS section
testcases.raw: TC_024WordsearchPositiveVerify order of words in WORDS section 1. Add multiple words in sequence. 2. Check the order in WORDS section. Words appear in the order they were added.Pending

testcases.description: Verify word highlight color for accessibility
testcases.raw: TC_025WordsearchPositiveVerify word highlight color for accessibility 1. Add a word. 2. Observe highlight color in grid. 3. Check with accessibility tools. Highlight color meets accessibility standards (contrast, visibility).Pending

testcases.description: Verify grid resize does not affect words
testcases.raw: TC_026WordsearchPositiveVerify grid resize does not affect words 1. Add words. 2. Resize grid (if available). 3. Check WORDS and highlights. Words and highlights remain correct after grid resize.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding numbers as word
testcases.raw: TC_027WordsearchNegativeVerify adding numbers as word 1. Enter a number (e.g. "123") in Hidden Word. 2. Click Add. System should reject or not allow numbers as valid words.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding word with only spaces
testcases.raw: TC_028WordsearchNegativeVerify adding word with only spaces 1. Enter spaces in Hidden Word. 2. Click Add. System should not add a word containing only spaces.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding word with leading/trailing spaces
testcases.raw: TC_029WordsearchNegativeVerify adding word with leading/trailing spaces 1. Enter a word with spaces before or after (e.g. " CAT "). 2. Click Add. Spaces are trimmed and word is added only if not a duplicate.Pending

testcases.description: Verify selecting all correct words in preview
testcases.raw: TC_030WordsearchPositiveVerify selecting all correct words in preview 1. Add multiple words. 2. Enter Preview. 3. Select all words in the grid. All words are shown with strikethrough in WORDS section.Pending

testcases.description: Verify removing all words from WORDS section
testcases.raw: TC_031WordsearchNegativeVerify removing all words from WORDS section 1. Add several words. 2. Remove all words using delete option. WORDS section is empty and no highlights are present in grid.Pending

testcases.description: Verify grid and WORDS section update after word removal
testcases.raw: TC_032WordsearchPositive Verify grid and WORDS section update after word removal 1. Add a word. 2. Remove that word. 3. Check grid and WORDS section. Word is removed from both grid highlight and WORDS section.Pending

testcases.description: Verify adding and finding minimum length word
testcases.raw: TC_033WordsearchPositiveVerify adding and finding minimum length word 1. Enter a word with the smallest allowed length (e.g. 2 characters). 2. Click Add. 3. Preview and select the word. Word is added, visible in WORDS, and can be found/highlighted in grid.Pending
